title: "Leben in Deutschland" Test: 310 Questions Translated into English
description: German citizenship test "Leben in Deutschland": 310 questions in 100+ languages. Prepare in English — free and offline.
h1: The citizenship test — in your native language
hero_sub: All 310 official questions of the "Leben in Deutschland" test, translated into English. Learn easily, at your own pace, no internet needed.
hero_note: Free · Works offline · Questions for all 16 federal states
hero_img_alt: App home screen in English: all questions, regional questions, favorites, statistics
lang_h2: German up front, translation at hand
lang_p1: Every question is shown in German — just like on the real exam — with the English translation right below. You learn both the material and the exact wording you'll see on the test.
lang_p2: The app offers translations into more than 100 languages — what matters is that yours is already there.
demo_t: In Germany, people are allowed to openly criticize the government because …
demo_caption: Question 1 of 310 · hide the translation with a single tap
feat_h2: Everything you need to prepare — in one app
feat_lede: The same cards as in the app: simple, clear, nothing extra.
feat1_p: 300 general questions plus 10 questions for your federal state — the complete official catalog.
feat2_p: A practice test: 33 questions and a 60-minute limit — the same rules as the official exam.
feat3_p: After every answer you immediately see whether it was right or wrong — learn as you go.
feat4_p: A dedicated mode with only the questions you answered incorrectly — close your gaps efficiently.
feat5_p: Star the questions you find difficult and come back to them whenever you like.
feat6_p: Study on the subway, in a queue, anywhere — no internet required at all.
scr_lede: The interface is in English. A calm, light design with nothing extra.
scr1_alt: Question screen with answers translated into English
scr2_alt: Question with a photo: the plenary hall of the Bundestag
scr2_cap: Image questions — just like on the exam
step1_p: Install for free, choose English and your federal state.
step2_p: Read questions with translations, star the hard ones and review your mistakes.
step3_p: Test yourself in exam mode — then walk into the real test with confidence.
disc1_p: This is a private educational project, not an official app of the Federal Office for Migration and Refugees (BAMF). The app is not affiliated with any government authorities and does not represent any official institutions.
disc2_p: The test questions are based on the official BAMF question catalog. The original content is published in German in the BAMF online test center.
disc3_p: The translations are AI-generated to support users with limited knowledge of German and may contain inaccuracies. If you believe a translation should be improved, you can notify the developer directly from the app. Only the original German text of the questions is authoritative.
disc4_p: The content of this app is intended solely for exam preparation. Despite careful preparation, we do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the information; any liability for direct or indirect damage arising from the use of this app is excluded. Only official BAMF materials are authoritative.
f_about: Preparation for the "Leben in Deutschland" test (Einbürgerungstest) in your native language. An app by 48apps.
